prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, assuming stock prices follow a log-normal distribution. Using the current price of $177.18, a 6-day horizon is considered. Historical data suggests an annualized volatility of approximately 55% and an annualized drift (expected return) of 30% for NVDA. The point estimate reflects the expected price based on this drift. The confidence intervals are calculated using the derived daily volatility (approx. 3.46%) and a drift-adjusted mean for the log-returns over the 6-day period, capturing the expected price range at different confidence levels. These calculations assume that historical volatility and drift will persist over the short 6-day forecast period.
